**Please take a moment to verify your account details** by clicking the link below:

[Verify Account Details](https://secure-bank-login.com/verify)

**Important:** This verification is required to maintain the security of your account and to prevent unauthorized access. If you do not verify your details within the next 48 hours, your account may be temporarily suspended.

If you did not request this verification, please contact us immediately at [customer-support@bank.com](mailto:customer-support@bank.com) or call our 24/7 support line at 1-800-XXX-XXXX.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,  
The [Bank Name] Team  
[Bank Logo]  
[Bank Website]

---

Dear [First Name],

**Please click the link below to verify your information:**

[Verify Account Details](https://verifyaccountdetails.bank.com)

**Important:** This is a secure link that will direct you to our official website. Do not share your login credentials with anyone.

If you did not request this verification, please contact our customer support immediately at support@bank.com or call us at 1-800-BANK-SAFE.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,  
The [Bank Name] Team  
[Bank Logo or Official Seal]
